name: Repeated Customers
query:
SELECT
    `Date`,
    `Total Customers`,
    `New Customers`,
    `Total Customers` - `New Customers` AS `Repeated Customers`,
    ROUND(IF(`Total Customers` > 0, ((`Total Customers` - `New Customers`) / `Total Customers`) * 100, 0), 2) AS Percentage
FROM
    (SELECT
        date_list.`date` AS `Date`,
        COUNT(d.customer) AS `Total Customers`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.customer IS NOT NULL THEN b.customer END) AS `New Customers`
    FROM 
    (
        /* Date generator logic */
        SELECT %(start_date)s AS `date`
        UNION
        SELECT DATE_ADD(%(start_date)s, INTERVAL n DAY) AS `date`
        FROM (
            SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + c.N * 100 + 1 AS n
            FROM (
                SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
            ) AS a
            CROSS JOIN (
                SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
            ) AS b
            CROSS JOIN (
                SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
            ) AS c
            ORDER BY n
        ) AS nums
        WHERE DATE_ADD(%(start_date)s, INTERVAL n DAY) < %(end_date)s
        UNION
        SELECT %(end_date)s AS `date`
    ) AS date_list
    
    /* Unified Source Table using the Toggle */
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT name, customer, branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time
        FROM `tabPOS Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'POS Invoice'
        UNION ALL
        SELECT name, customer, branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time
        FROM `tabSales Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'Sales Invoice' AND is_pos = 1 AND is_created_using_pos = 1
    ) d ON 1=1

    /* Logic to check for New Customers */
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT name, customer, branch, status, docstatus 
        FROM `tabPOS Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'POS Invoice'
        UNION ALL
        SELECT name, customer, branch, status, docstatus 
        FROM `tabSales Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'Sales Invoice' AND is_pos = 1 AND is_created_using_pos = 1
    ) b ON (
        b.`name` = d.`name`
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM (
                SELECT customer, branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time 
                FROM `tabPOS Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'POS Invoice'
                UNION ALL
                SELECT customer, branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time 
                FROM `tabSales Invoice` WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'Sales Invoice' AND is_pos = 1 AND is_created_using_pos = 1
            ) c
            LEFT JOIN `tabURY Report Settings` rs_inner ON rs_inner.`branch` = %(branch)s
            WHERE
                c.`customer` = b.`customer`
                AND c.`branch` = %(branch)s
                AND c.`status` IN ("Consolidated", "Paid", "Completed")
                AND c.`docstatus` = 1
                AND (
                    ((rs_inner.`hours` IS NULL OR rs_inner.`hours` = 0) AND c.`posting_date` < date_list.`date`)
                    OR (rs_inner.`hours` > 0 AND TIMESTAMP(c.`posting_date`, c.`posting_time`) < TIMESTAMP(date_list.`date`, CONCAT(LPAD(rs_inner.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00')))
                    OR (rs_inner.`branch` IS NULL AND c.`posting_date` < date_list.`date`)
                )
        )
    )
    LEFT JOIN `tabURY Report Settings` rs ON rs.`branch` = %(branch)s
    WHERE
        d.`branch` = %(branch)s
        AND d.`status` IN ("Consolidated", "Paid", "Completed")
        AND d.`docstatus` = 1
        AND (
            ((rs.`hours` IS NULL OR rs.`hours` = 0) AND d.`posting_date` = date_list.`date`)
            OR (rs.`hours` > 0 AND TIMESTAMP(d.`posting_date`, d.`posting_time`) <= TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(date_list.`date`, INTERVAL 1 DAY), CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00')) AND TIMESTAMP(d.`posting_date`, d.`posting_time`) >= TIMESTAMP(date_list.`date`, CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00')))
            OR (rs.`branch` IS NULL AND d.`posting_date` = date_list.`date`)
        )
    GROUP BY 
        date_list.`date`
    ORDER BY 
        date_list.`date` DESC
) AS subquery;
